name: Bug report
about: Something broken in a Vibes DIY package or on vibes.diy

**Which package or surface?** (`use-vibes`, `vibes-diy` CLI, `@vibes.diy/prompts`, `call-ai`, `img-vibes`, or vibes.diy itself)

**What happened?**

**What did you expect?**

**How to reproduce** (steps, code snippet, or a link to a vibe)

**Versions** (package version, browser/Node, OS)
